headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Stanley Black & Decker, Raises Price Target to $90
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Sam Reid   maintains Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE:SWK) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $80 to $90.
